# Cortex Skills

Curated skill files that teach AI agents how to build on the Cortex intelligence ecosystem. Fetch the root skill for an overview, then fetch sub-skills as needed.

> Entry point: cortexskills.org/SKILL.md

## Sub-Skills

### Core
- `cortexskills.org/setup/SKILL.md` — Deploy Cortex via Docker, configure 50+ environment variables.
- `cortexskills.org/auth/SKILL.md` — API keys, permissions, prompt security.

### Features
- `cortexskills.org/upload/SKILL.md` — Document ingestion, formats, chunking.
- `cortexskills.org/search/SKILL.md` — Hybrid search (vector + keyword + graph).
- `cortexskills.org/ask/SKILL.md` — RAG Q&A, streaming, agentic reasoning.
- `cortexskills.org/graph/SKILL.md` — Knowledge graph, entities, relationships.
- `cortexskills.org/collections/SKILL.md` — Scoping documents by project/tenant.
- `cortexskills.org/communities/SKILL.md` — Auto-clustering and summarization.
- `cortexskills.org/turbo/SKILL.md` — GPU acceleration via Compute3.

### Ecosystem
- `cortexskills.org/integration/SKILL.md` — LangChain, CrewAI, MCP, Slack, webhooks.
- `cortexskills.org/apps/SKILL.md` — Source and workflow apps (YouTube, Notion, Web Crawler).
- `cortexskills.org/cortex-design/SKILL.md` — The Bold Typography design system for Cortex UIs.
